PAL789, line up and wait runway two four
corpus.explanation: Line up and wait requires full readback for safety verification

corpus.atc: UAE321, hold short of runway two four
corpus.explanation: Hold short instruction requires runway readback to prevent incursions

corpus.atc: CEB456, hold short of runway two four right
corpus.explanation: Missing right designator in hold short - runway incursion risk

corpus.atc: UAE789, cross runway one three center
corpus.explanation: Missing center designator when crossing parallel runways

corpus.atc: CEB four five six, hold short of runway two four left
corpus.pilot: Holding short of runway two four left, CEB four five six
corpus.explanation: Correct acknowledgment of hold short instruction — states position explicitly

corpus.atc: PAL one two three, hold short of runway zero six
corpus.explanation: ICAO Doc 4444: 'WILCO' is NOT sufficient for HOLD SHORT instructions. Pilot must say 'HOLDING SHORT OF RUNWAY 06' — explicit position confirmation required.

corpus.atc: CEB seven eight niner, hold position
corpus.explanation: Correct acknowledgment of hold instruction using 'HOLDING'

corpus.atc: PAL three four one, hold position
corpus.explanation: ICAO: 'ROGER' is not sufficient for HOLD POSITION instruction. Required acknowledgment: 'HOLDING'

corpus.atc: PAL101, taxi to runway two four via alpha, bravo, hold short of runway two four
corpus.explanation: Pilot omitted taxi route alpha, bravo and hold-short instruction. Full route and hold-short must be read back per ICAO Doc 4444 Sec 4.7.

corpus.atc: CEB210, taxi to holding point runway zero four via echo, delta
corpus.explanation: 'Roger' not acceptable for taxi instructions. Must read back full route: 'Echo, delta, holding point runway zero four, CEB210'

corpus.atc: PAL302, hold short of runway zero four
corpus.pilot: Holding short runway zero four, PAL302
corpus.explanation: Correct explicit readback of hold-short with runway designation.

corpus.atc: AIR101, cross runway two four, taxi to apron via alpha
corpus.pilot: Cross runway two four, alpha to apron, AIR101
corpus.explanation: Correct readback - runway crossing and route confirmed.

corpus.atc: CEB303, taxi via alpha, hold short runway zero four
corpus.explanation: 'Wilco' without readback of route and hold-short is not acceptable.

corpus.atc: PAL404, pushback approved, expect runway two four
corpus.pilot: Pushback approved, runway two four, PAL404
corpus.explanation: Correct pushback readback with runway expectation confirmed.

corpus.atc: CEB601, line up and wait runway zero four
corpus.pilot: Lining up runway zero four, CEB601
corpus.explanation: Correct line-up-and-wait readback with runway designation.

corpus.atc: PAL505, hold short runway two four, traffic on final
corpus.explanation: Runway designation omitted in hold-short readback. Runway must always be included.

corpus.atc: CEB808, engine start approved, pushback at your discretion
corpus.explanation: Pushback authority not read back. Both engine start and pushback elements must be confirmed.

corpus.atc: PAL222, taxi via bravo, echo, cross runway two four, hold short runway zero four
corpus.pilot: Bravo, echo, cross runway two four, hold short runway zero four, PAL222
corpus.explanation: Correct complex taxi readback with crossing and hold-short instructions.

corpus.atc: PAL222, taxi via bravo, echo, cross runway two four, hold short runway zero four
corpus.pilot: Bravo, echo, runway zero four, PAL222
corpus.explanation: Pilot omitted 'cross runway two four' clearance and 'hold short' from readback.

corpus.atc: CEB888, hold short runway two four, number two for departure
corpus.pilot: Hold short runway two four, CEB888
corpus.explanation: Correct hold-short readback with runway. Traffic sequence info (number two) does not need readback.
